tool.name: smb_enumerator
tool.description: SMB/CIFS enumeration for share discovery, user enumeration, and security assessment.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - List available SMB shares on a target - Check for null session access - Enumerate domain users via SMB - Check SMB signing configuration - Detect SMB protocol versions - Identify writable shares

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The enumeration action to perform: - list_shares: List available SMB shares - check_null_session: Test for null session access - enumerate_users: Enumerate users via RID cycling - check_signing: Check SMB signing requirements - check_permissions: Check share access permissions - full_enum: Run all enumeration checks

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Target host IP address or hostname

parameter.name: username
parameter.description: Username for authentication (optional, empty for null session)

returns.description: Enumeration results with shares, users, and security findings

tool.examples:
# List SMB shares
list_shares 192.168.1.1
# Check for null session
check_null_session 10.0.0.1
# Enumerate with credentials
enumerate_users dc01.domain.local user pass DOMAIN
# Full enumeration
full_enum 192.168.1.1
